rationale: Gov't Code §2260.001 defines terms for state government contract disputes. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: "Unit of state government" means the state or an agency, department, commission, bureau, board, office, council, court, or other entity that is in any branch of state government
_note: Rule text concerns government contract definitions; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
